title: (Pwn2Own) QNAP TS-453E  Hyper Data Protector Plugin query_original_file_size SQL Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows network-adjacent attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of QNAP TS-453E. Although authentication is required to exploit this vulnerability, the existing authentication mechanism can be bypassed.
The specific flaw exists within the query_original_file_size method. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of a user-supplied string before using it to construct SQL queries. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of root.
addtionnal_details: QNAP has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:https://www.qnap.com/en/security-advisory/qsa-25-48
timeline:
2025-12-15 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-03-16 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-03-16 - Advisory Updated
